title: テイエムオペラオー登場！

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
At long last, I, the Overlord, have entered the
Twinkle Series. The time for my presence to shine
upon the masses has come!

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
Thus, here I am with my nose to the grindstone in
hopes of reaching its twinkling summit. I shall
hone my skills beyond perfection for a victorious
performance!

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text: Now begins the prologue to Origins of the Centurial Overlord.
